name: Savills PLC
description: A global real estate services group providing advisory, property management, consultancy and investment management services across 70+ countries with 42,000+ staff. Revenue streams include transaction advisory (36%), property & facilities management (39%), consultancy (21%) and investment management (4%).

assumptions.revenueDrivers: Global real estate transaction volumes recovery driving Transaction Advisory (36% of revenue). Less transactional businesses (Property Management 39%, Consultancy 21%) provide resilient base. Revenue £2,404m in FY2024 (+7% YoY). Geographic mix: UK 42%, Asia Pacific 29%, CEME 16%, North America 13%.
assumptions.marginDrivers: Underlying profit margin expanded to 5.4% in FY2024 (from 4.2% in FY2023) driven by operational leverage in recovering transactional markets and benefits of prior restructuring. Peak margin was 9.3% in FY2021. Partnership-style remuneration model aligns cost base with revenue cycles.
assumptions.risks: Highly cyclical transactional revenues (36% of group). Sensitivity to interest rates and debt costs impacting real estate transaction volumes. Geographic and currency exposure (58% non-UK revenue). Post-pandemic office utilisation uncertainty in some markets. Restructuring costs of £17.2m in FY2024.
assumptions.catalyst: Continued global real estate market recovery. Re-financing driven transaction activity. Sustainability-driven demand for Grade A office space. Strategic acquisitions supported by strong balance sheet (£176m net cash). AUM growth in Investment Management (£21.7bn). UK revenue crossed £1bn milestone in FY2024.
